channel.title: Hugo on Alexandre MYARA
channel.description: Recent content in Hugo on Alexandre MYARA

item.title: Mon premier article
item.description:
Understanding Generative Modeling through transport theory

Generative modeling is often understood as the training of a neural network with a well-chosen objective function. The key idea is to approximate an unknown distribution $p_{\text{data}}$ by a learnable distribution $p_\theta$. However the objective function doesn’t let us see the fact that they optimize a distribution, we only see that we optimize a neural-network.

In this article we will explore main generative model by analyze their loss and shows how do they optimize a distribution.
